# cloudflare_zero_trust_dex_rules (Data Source)



## Example Usage

```terraform
data "cloudflare_zero_trust_dex_rules" "example_zero_trust_dex_rules" {
  account_id = "01a7362d577a6c3019a474fd6f485823"
  name = "name"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `account_id` (String)

### Optional

- `max_items` (Number) Max items to fetch, default: 1000
- `name` (String) Filter results by rule name
- `sort_by` (String) Which property to sort results by
Available values: "name", "created_at", "updated_at".
- `sort_order` (String) Sort direction for sort_by property
Available values: "ASC", "DESC".

### Read-Only

- `result` (Attributes List) The items returned by the data source (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--result))

<a id="nestedatt--result"></a>
### Nested Schema for `result`

Read-Only:

- `rules` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--result--rules))

<a id="nestedatt--result--rules"></a>
### Nested Schema for `result.rules`

Read-Only:

- `created_at` (String)
- `description` (String)
- `id` (String) API Resource UUID tag.
- `match` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `targeted_tests` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--result--rules--targeted_tests))
- `updated_at` (String)

<a id="nestedatt--result--rules--targeted_tests"></a>
### Nested Schema for `result.rules.targeted_tests`

Read-Only:

- `data` (Attributes) The configuration object which contains the details for the WARP client to conduct the test. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--result--rules--targeted_tests--data))
- `enabled` (Boolean)
- `name` (String)
- `test_id` (String)

<a id="nestedatt--result--rules--targeted_tests--data"></a>
### Nested Schema for `result.rules.targeted_tests.data`

Read-Only:

- `host` (String) The desired endpoint to test.
- `kind` (String) The type of test.
Available values: "http", "traceroute".
- `method` (String) The HTTP request method type.
Available values: "GET".
